{{CargoClone
|name=The Despot
|rank=purple
|cabin=2
|id=84
|gene1={race} HP +300
|gene2={race} FTH +30
|gene3=Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:
> Troop HP +80
|gene4=Refine +1 Green Rebel Material +1%
|gene5=Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:
> Troop HP +120
|gene6=Refine +1 Green Rebel Material +1.5%
|}}
